name: Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch square pan with foil extending over the sides of the pan; butter the foil.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
4. Add marshmallow cream and chocolate chips; blend until smooth. Stir in walnuts and vanilla extract.
5. Pour into prepared pan. Chill two hours, or until firm.
6. Turn fudge onto a cutting board. Peel off foil and cut into squares.
